notes: PagerDuty incident notifications. Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field (the demo-zone schema has no blocks field). Canonical incident card = header (🚨 SEV/severity Triggered) + a one-line summary section + section(fields) for Severity/Service/Triggered/Urgency/Assigned + a context footer with the incident # and escalation policy. Pair the Triggered card with a Resolved card (✅ … Resolved) that carries MTTR + Resolved by. Great for incident/ops channels; the human on-call replies in a thread on the triggered card.

examples.name: incident_triggered
examples.when: A monitor/alert opens a SEV incident and pages the on-call; posted to an incident channel.

text.text: *Latency spike detected in Siemens Opcenter (MOM/MES)* — API p99 breaching threshold on the Quality module.

elements.text: PagerDuty · Incident #INC-4471 · Escalation Policy: OneTech Manufacturing OT

examples.name: incident_resolved
examples.when: The incident is resolved; posts MTTR and who resolved it.

text.text: *Incident resolved.* Blocking DB session cleared; Opcenter Quality latency back to baseline. Line never stopped.
